name: Citation Tools
description: Auxiliary citation management surface for organizing a citation library and running Shepardize-style validity checks with visual citation graphs.

page_briefs.citations: Citation manager page. Top region renders a data-table of tracked citations with columns for case name, citation, jurisdiction, treatment signal, date added, and associated matter. Below, a timeline citation-graph visualizes how tracked authorities relate chronologically, making it easy to spot which cases dominate a body of law.
page_briefs.citation-check: Shepardize validity check page. Top region shows a hierarchical citation-graph rooted at the target authority, branching out to subsequent cases that cite it with color-coded treatment signals — positive, negative, distinguished, overruled. Below, a data-table lists each citing case with columns for case, court, year, treatment, and the specific passage cited.
